title: Sacks
description: Smaller shulker boxes to solve early game inventory management.
body:
# Sacks

A single feature mod that adds a sack block that can hold up to 9 stacks of items. When broken, they keep their items inside them similar to a shulker box, allowing for easy transportation.
They can also be dyed in a crafting table.

<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipe</summary>

![5 leather, 2 string, 1 iron ingot, 1 chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a92576e6ec34cb64bc98444c7c23d8dd0e50d099.png)

When Create Mod is installed, the iron ingot will be replaced with a iron sheet.

</details>
